$comment: Layer A for PAYSLIP vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Generated gross values span the PIC 9(7)V99 range; every generated case exercises the full file round trip (write, close, serialize) on the legacy side and the mirrored temp-file round trip on the modern side.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 PAYSLIP (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-payslip, file-serializing wrapper)
